coefficients at different flight phases, materials, wings and flaps design, stability considerations and economic analysis. + group project: preliminary design of an airport. icao standard and recommended practices were followed strictly in this project. group project: study of the influence of pressure ratio and the inlet turbine temperature in the performance of a jet engine. involved the study of the aero-engine fundamentals and the use of the gasturb software. group project: development of a shock wave simulator. work involved the understanding of the shock waves phenomena and the
